title: Klaviyo vs GetResponse (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and GetResponse email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which suits your business best.
h1: Klaviyo vs GetResponse: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Both Klaviyo and GetResponse offer freemium email marketing solutions, but they serve different business needs. Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation, while GetResponse excels at webinars and online courses. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right platform for your marketing goals.
choose_a_if: You run a Shopify or WooCommerce store and need specialized e-commerce marketing automation
Predictive analytics and SMS marketing capabilities are priorities for your campaigns
You want advanced segmentation and behavioral targeting for product launches
choose_b_if: You host webinars or sell online courses as part of your business model
Budget is your primary concern and you need affordable entry-level pricing
You want to build landing pages and sales funnels without additional tools

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce businesses with superior predictive analytics and SMS integration, while GetResponse is better for content creators and course sellers. Both have strong automation, but Klaviyo has higher user ratings (4.6 vs 4.2 on G2).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or GetResponse?
faq.a: GetResponse is more affordable, starting at $19/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Both offer free tiers with 500 subscribers, making them equally accessible for testing. However, pricing differences narrow as you scale.

faq.q: Can I switch from GetResponse to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list exports and imports. Most contact data can be migrated, though automation workflows will need to be recreated in your new platform. Plan the transition during a low-campaign period for best results.
